name: Van Morrison
abstract: Sir George Ivan "Van" Morrison (born 31 August 1945) is a Northern Irish musician, singer, and songwriter whose recording career started in the 1960s. Morrison's albums have performed well in the UK and Ireland, with more than 40 reaching the UK Top 40, as well as internationally, including in the United States, Germany, and the Netherla…

works_created.t: When Will I Ever Learn to Live in God

about_quotes.speaker: Warren Smith
about_quotes.evidence: Van was very shy, but we did all this stuff in like two days... And he had this big bag of vegetable leaf... he would hardly come out of the booth... but you know he just brought these tunes out and we just played them.
about_quotes.doc_title: Warren Smith interviewed by Monk Rowe, Utica, New York, March 17, 2018

about_quotes.speaker: Jimmy Witherspoon
about_quotes.evidence: Van Morrison just called me the other day... asking would I play with him in New York for four days this month. Now we are so tight that there was no money discussed.
about_quotes.doc_title: Jimmy Witherspoon interviewed by Monk Rowe, Sarasota, FL, April 12, 1996

about_quotes.speaker: Jimmy Cobb
about_quotes.evidence: [INTERVIEWER] He – when we all went to San Francisco many years ago, he got with Van Morrison. Van lives . . . [INTERVIEWEE] Pretty close to him.
about_quotes.doc_title: Jimmy Cobb — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History
